text: Amidst the ordered sterility of glass and concrete, I feel a curious detachment—a sense of being both observer and participant. Passing into the playful, ambiguous exhibition, awash in color and glowing words, that detachment transforms into reflection. Am I a recorder or the recorded? Here, confusion becomes comforting, a puzzle of meaning assembled only after experience. It is all a gently disorienting dance between clarity and mystery.
